sql_array: CREATE TABLE event_log (event_id INTEGER, event_time TIMESTAMPTZ);
INSERT INTO event_log (event_id, event_time) VALUES (1, TIMESTAMPTZ '2023-10-01 14:30:00');
UPDATE event_log SET event_time = datetrunc('minute', event_time) WHERE event_id = 1;
SELECT event_id, datetrunc('hour', event_time) AS truncated_time FROM event_log;
DELETE FROM event_log WHERE event_time < datetrunc('day', TIMESTAMPTZ '2023-10-01 00:00:00');
